questionText: Provide further details of the verification/assurance undertaken for your Scope 3 emissions and attach the relevant statements.
questionKo: Scope 3 배출량에 대해 수행한 검증 / 보증에 대한 자세한 내용을 제공하고 관련 명세서를 첨부하십시오

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Third-party verification or assurance process in place" for Scope 3 emissions in response to 7.9.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항은 7.9에 대한 응답으로 Scope 3 배출에 대해 "제3자 검증 또는 보증 프로세스가 마련되어 있음"을 선택한 경우에만 나타납니다.

guidance.text:
General
If you are reporting third party verification or assurance underway, your entries into the table should reflect the emissions that are being subject to verification/assurance for the current reporting year, with the exception of the attached statement, which will relate to a previous year.
CDP understands that you may seek verification for reasons other than reporting to CDP and that confidential information may be included within your detailed verification statement. In this case, it is sufficient for your verifier/assurer to attest to the Scope and level of assurance/verification through correspondence such as an abbreviated statement as long as this covers the data points outlined below (see guidance for column 5 Attach your statement here').
If you are reporting that all of your reported scope 3 emissions have been verified/assured, then the total of the figures entered into column 9 "Proportion of total reported scope 3 emissions verified (%)" across all rows should equal 100%. The total of all rows entered into column 9 of this table should not exceed 100%.
Scope 3 category (column 1) 
Select the Scope 3 categories your verification/assurance statement covers.
For more information on Scope 3 categories, refer to the Greenhouse Gas Protocol's Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Accounting and Reporting Standard .
Add rows if any of the information in columns 2-7 differs between the scope 3 categories over which you have sought verification, e.g., if you have obtained a higher level of assurance for certain categories, or if verification/assurance is still underway for some categories. Otherwise, if the same verification statement covers multiple scope 3 categories, report these in one row.
Verification or assurance cycle in place (column 2) 
A biennial verification/assurance process is where Scope 3 emissions are verified once every two years and triennial verification/assurance process where Scope 3 emissions are verified once every three years.
You may refer to the further information in 7.9 on annual, biennial and triennial processes for further information on annual, biennial and triennial processes.
Status in the current reporting year (column 3) 
Please select the option most appropriate to your company.
Type of verification or assurance (column 4) 
This column relates to the type of verification or assurance that has been awarded.
The option that is relevant will depend on the verification standard to which the verification process has been completed and the level of assurance agreed between the verifier and the company.
Companies can select from the following options:
Not applicable - In very few cases, usually in program based compliance, the verification standard does not include a level of assurance; in this case select this option.
Limited assurance - This is one of the most common levels of assurance and, for e.g., is appropriate to verification undertaken in accordance with ISO14064-3, ISAE3000, ASAE3000 and The Climate Registry.
Moderate assurance - For example, this level of assurance is appropriate to verification undertaken in accordance with AA1000AS and attestation standards established by AICPA.
Reasonable assurance - For example, this is appropriate to verification undertaken under ISO14064-3, ISAE3000, ASAE3000 and The Climate Registry; all verification undertaken for EU ETS compliance is to a level of "reasonable assurance" (according to the requirements of EA-6/03).
High assurance - For example, this is appropriate to verification undertaken in accordance with AA1000AS and attestation standards established by AICPA.
Third party verification/assurance underway - Select this option if verification/assurance is underway and you do not yet know the level of assurance that you are intending to achieve.
Attach the statement (column 5) 
Note the requirements for the statement detailed below and the option to use the CDP template.
All companies should attach a verification statement here unless they have selected "No verification or assurance of current reporting year" or "Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place" in column 3 ‘Status in the current reporting year'. The statement should:
Clearly state that GHG emissions have been verified or assured as part of the process. If the statement refers to other documents that have been verified (such as Sustainability Report, Financial Report, GRI etc.) where items verified are specified, please attach those to the question as well;
Relate to the relevant Scope 3 categories;
Clearly state the opinion and type of verification/assurance that has been given and the verification standard used.
Covers the current reporting year, or covers the 12-months prior if "Underway but not complete for reporting year - previous statement of process attached" is selected in "Status in the current reporting year" column.
Page/section reference (column 6) 
Please identify the page and the section that contains details of your verification/assurance of Scope 3 emissions.
Relevant standard (column 7) 
This column captures the verification standard against which the verification process has been undertaken. It does not refer to the reporting or calculation standard.
CDP has produced criteria for what constitutes an acceptable verification standard. All accepted verification standards, and exceptions to their use, are listed here .
The verification standard reported in this column should be consistent with the standard stated in the verification statement. If the response is submitted before the official CDP deadline, CDP will then review the standard used and add it to the website under "accepted" or "not accepted" depending on the outcome of the standard review.
If the response is submitted after the official deadline, CDP cannot commit to review the standard used in time for scoring.
Select from the accepted standards listed or use "Other, please specify".
Standards that have been approved by EU Member States for ESRS verification (e.g. H2A in France, SSAE in Italy or other such standards) should be reported by selecting the option "European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS)".
The verification standards reported in this column should be consistent with the standards stated in the verification statement.
Proportion of selected emissions categories verified (%) (column 8) 
It may be the case that only a sub-section of your emissions has been verified/assured due to, for e.g., regulatory requirements.
Please identify what proportion of your reported emissions for the selected Scope 3 categories has been subject to the verification/assurance process described.
The percentage of reported emissions verified can be calculated using the following equation:
(Total emissions verified in selected Scope 3 categories in metric tons CO2e) / (Total emissions reported in selected Scope 3 categories in metric tons CO2e) × 100%
Proportion of total reported scope 3 emissions verified (%) (column 9) 
Please identify what proportion of your total scope 3 emissions reported in 7.8 has been subject to the verification/assurance process described.
The percentage of reported emissions verified can be calculated using the following equation:
(Total emissions verified in selected scope 3 categories in metric tons CO2e) / (Total emissions across all reported scope 3 categories in metric tons CO2e) × 100%
If all reported scope 3 categories have been verified under the same verification process/statement, this figure may be the same as the figure reported in the previous column "Proportion of selected emissions categories verified (%)" (column 8).
Note for financial services companies: 
Financial services companies are requested to verify figures reported in 12.1.1and/or 12.1.3 in row "Scope 3 Investments".
Financial services companies disclosing data for multiple portfolios in 12.1.1 and/or 12.1.3 are requested to clarify which portfolios the verification relates to in column 6 "Page/section reference".
If the verification process is different for different portfolios, use "add row" to disclose them separately.
The verification of data in module 12 - Environmental Performance (FS), other than data disclosed in 12.1.1 and/or 12.1.3, should be disclosed in 13.1.1.
guidance.textKo:
일반
진행 중인 제3자 검증 또는 보증을 보고하는 경우, 전년도와 관련된 첨부 명세서를 제외하고 현재 보고연도에 검증/보증 목표인 배출량을 표에 항목으로 반영해야 합니다. CDP는 귀사가 CDP에 보고하는 것 이외의 이유로 확인을 요청할 수 있으며 귀사의 세부 확인서에 기밀 정보가 포함될 수 있다는 점을 이해합니다. 이 경우 검증자/보증인은 아래에 설명된 데이터 포인트를 포함하는 한 약식 진술과 같은 서신을 통해 보증/검증의 범위 및 수준을 증명하는 것으로 충분합니다(5열 여기에 진술을 첨부하십시오'에 대한 지침 참조). 보고된 Scope 3 배출량이 모두 검증/보증되었다고 보고하는 경우 모든 행에서 9열 "검증된 총 보고 Scope 3 배출량 비율(%)"에 입력된 수치의 합계는 100%와 같아야 합니다. 이 표의 9열에 입력된 모든 행의 합계는 100%를 초과할 수 없습니다. Scope 3 범주(1열) 
검증/보장 명세서에서 다루는 Scope 3 범주를 선택하십시오. Scope 3 범주에 대한 자세한 내용은 온실가스 프로토콜의 기업 가치 사슬(Scope 3) 회계 및 보고 표준을 참조하십시오. 2~7열의 정보 중 검증을 원하는 Scope 3 범주 간에 다른 정보가 있는 경우(예: 특정 범주에 대해 더 높은 수준의 보증을 획득했거나 일부 범주에 대해 검증/보증이 아직 진행 중인 경우) 행을 추가하세요. 그렇지 않고, 동일한 검증 진술서가 여러 Scope 3 범주를 ​​다루는 경우 이를 한 행에 보고합니다. 검증 또는 보증 주기가 확립되어 있습니다(2열). 
2년마다 검증/보증 프로세스는 Scope 3 배출량을 2년에 한 번씩 검증하는 것이며, 3년마다 Scope 3 배출량을 3년에 한 번씩 검증하는 검증/보증 프로세스입니다. 연간, 2년, 3년 과정에 대한 추가 정보는 연간, 2년, 3년 과정에 관한 7.9의 추가 정보를 참조할 수 있습니다. 당해 보고연도의 현황(3열) 
귀사의 기업에 가장 적합한 선택지를 선택해 주세요. 검증 또는 보증 유형(4열) 
이 열은 부여된 검증 또는 보증 유형과 관련됩니다. 관련 선택지는 검증 프로세스가 완료된 검증 표준과 검증자와 기업 간에 합의된 보증 수준에 따라 달라집니다. 기업은 다음 선택지 중에서 선택할 수 있습니다.
해당 없음 - 일반적으로 프로그램 기반 규정 준수의 경우 검증 표준에 보증 수준이 포함되지 않는 경우가 많습니다. 이 경우 이 선택지를 선택하십시오. 제한적 보증 - 이는 가장 일반적인 보증 수준 중 하나이며, 예를 들어 ISO14064-3, ISAE3000, ASAE3000 및 The Climate Registry에 따라 수행된 검증에 적합합니다. 보통 수준의 보증 - 예를 들어 이 보증 수준은 AA1000AS 및 AICPA에서 제정한 증명 표준에 따라 수행되는 검증에 적합합니다.

합리적인 보증 - 예를 들어 ISO14064-3, ISAE3000, ASAE3000 및 The Climate Registry에 따라 수행된 검증에 적합합니다. EU ETS 준수를 위해 수행된 모든 검증은 (EA-6/03의 요구 사항에 따라) "합리적인 보증" 수준입니다. 높은 보증 - 예를 들어 AA1000AS 및 AICPA에서 제정한 증명 표준에 따라 수행되는 검증에 적합합니다. 제3자 검증/보증 진행 중 - 검증/보증이 진행 중이고 달성하려는 보증 수준을 아직 알지 못하는 경우 이 선택지를 선택하십시오. 명세서 첨부(5열) 
아래에 자세히 설명된 설명문의 요구 사항과 CDP 템플릿을 사용하는 선택지를 참고하세요. 모든 기업은 3열 '현재 보고연도의 상태'에서 "현재 보고연도에 대한 검증 또는 보증 없음" 또는 "현재 보고연도에 대해 진행 중이지만 완료되지 않음 - 발생한 첫 해"를 선택하지 않는 한 여기에 확인서를 첨부해야 합니다. 성명서는 다음과 같아야 합니다:
온실가스 배출량이 프로세스의 일부로 검증 또는 보장되었음을 명확하게 기술합니다. 기타 검증된 문서(지속가능성 보고서, 재무보고서, GRI 등)에 검증된 항목이 명시되어 있는 경우에는 해당 내용도 문항에 첨부해 주십시오.
관련 Scope 3 범주와 관련됩니다.
검증/보증의 의견, 유형, 검증기준을 명확히 기술합니다. 현재 보고연도를 포함하며, "현재 보고연도의 상태" 열에서 "보고연도에 진행 중이지만 완료되지 않음 - 이전 프로세스 명세서 첨부"를 선택한 경우 이전 12개월을 포함합니다. 페이지/섹션 참조(6열) 
Scope 3 배출에 대한 확인/보증에 대한 세부 정보가 포함된 페이지와 섹션을 확인하십시오. 관련 표준(7열) 
이 열에는 검증 프로세스가 수행된 검증 표준이 나와 있습니다. 보고 또는 계산 표준을 참조하지 않습니다. CDP는 수용 가능한 검증 표준을 구성하는 기준을 마련했습니다. 허용되는 모든 확인 표준과 사용 예외 사항은 여기에 나열되어 있습니다. 본 열에 보고된 검증기준은 검증성명서에 기재된 기준과 일치해야 합니다. 공식 CDP 마감일 이전에 응답이 제출되면 CDP는 사용된 표준을 검토하고 표준 검토 결과에 따라 이를 "승인됨" 또는 "승인되지 않음"으로 웹사이트에 추가합니다. 공식 마감일 이후에 답변이 제출되면 CDP는 채점 시간에 맞춰 사용된 표준을 검토할 것을 약속할 수 없습니다. 나열된 허용 표준 중에서 선택하거나 "기타, 명시하십시오"를 사용하십시오. ESRS 검증을 위해 EU 회원국에서 승인한 표준(예: 프랑스의 H2A, 이탈리아의 SSAE 또는 기타 유사한 표준)은 "유럽 지속 가능성 보고 표준(ESRS)" 선택지를 선택하여 보고해야 합니다. 본 열에 보고된 검증기준은 검증성명서에 기술된 기준과 일치해야 합니다.

확인된 선택된 배출 범주의 비율(%)(8열) 
예를 들어 규제 요구 사항으로 인해 배출량의 하위 섹션만 검증/보증된 경우가 있을 수 있습니다. 선택한 Scope 3 범주에 대해 보고된 배출량 중 기술된 검증/보증 프로세스가 적용되는 비율을 식별하십시오. 확인된 보고된 배출량의 백분율은 다음 방정식을 사용하여 계산할 수 있습니다.
(선택된 Scope 3 범주에서 검증된 총 배출량(미터톤 CO2e)) / (선택된 Scope 3 범주에서 보고된 총 배출량(미터톤 CO2e)) × 100%
보고된 총 Scope 3 배출 확인 비율(%)(9열) 
7.8에 보고된 전체 Scope 3 배출량 중 기술된 검증/보증 프로세스의 목표이 된 비율을 식별하십시오. 확인된 보고된 배출량의 백분율은 다음 방정식을 사용하여 계산할 수 있습니다.
(선택된 Scope 3 범주에서 확인된 총 배출량(미터톤 CO2e)) / (보고된 모든 Scope 3 범주의 총 배출량(미터톤 CO2e)) × 100%
보고된 모든 Scope 3 범주가 동일한 검증 프로세스/진술서에서 검증된 경우 이 수치는 이전 열 "검증된 선택된 배출 범주의 비율(%)"(8열)에 보고된 수치와 동일할 수 있습니다. 금융 서비스 기업 참고사항:

At least 4/5 Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
ROUTE A)
Any of the following are met - 0.5 points
In at least one row where 'Annual process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) (excluding criteria v) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of total reported scope 3 emissions verified (%)' is 70 or higher.
OR
In at least one row where 'Biennial process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All relevant statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) (excluding criteria v) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of total reported scope 3 emissions verified (%)' is 70 or higher..
OR
In at least one row where 'Triennial process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All relevant statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) (excluding criteria v) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of total reported scope 3 emissions verified (%)' is 70 or higher.
A maximum of 0.5/0.5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' in all rows - 0 points
A maximum of 0/0.5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/0.5 points is available for this route.
One row scored.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
ROUTE A)
'Yes' is selected in column 'Activity undertaken' AND only 'Life and/or Health' selected in column 'Insurance types underwritten' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 1.10 AND 'No' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in all of the following rows in question 1.10:
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
Document(s) in column 'Attach the statement' meet all of the following criteria - 5 points
i) The statement relates to Scope 3 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions OR it is clear that Scope 3 GHG emissions were the subject of the assurance engagement.
AND
ii) The statement relates to the correct reporting year provided in question 1.4 and 'Complete' is selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year'.
OR
'Annual process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 12-month period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Biennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 2-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Triennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 3-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
AND
iii) The verification standard referenced in the document is accepted by CDP.
AND
iv) The statement contains an opinion or finding which confirms verification.
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Either 'Yes' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in question 1.10 in any of the following rows:
'Banking (Bank)'
'Investing (Asset manager)'
'Investing (Asset owner)'
OR
'Yes' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' AND 'General (non-life)' selected in column 'Insurance types underwritten' in question 1.10.
Full Awareness points must be awarded in question 12.1.1 OR 12.1.3 to be eligible for this route.
i) Document(s) in column 'Attach the statement' meet ROUTE A) criteria i) to iv) - 4 points
ii) If criteria i) is met an additional point will be awarded for the following:
Document in column 'Attach the statement' relates to at least one portfolio group as specified in column 'Portfolio' in question 12.1.1 OR 12.1.3 - 1 point
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
Any of the following must be met to be eligible for this route:
Full Awareness points awarded in question 12.1.1 OR 12.1.3.
OR
'Yes' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' AND only 'Life and/or Health' selected in column 'Insurance types underwritten' in row 'Insurance underwriting (Insurance company)' in question 1.10 AND 'No' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in all of the following rows in question 1.10:
- 'Banking (Bank)'
- 'Investing (Asset manager)'
- 'Investing (Asset owner)'
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' - 4 points
A maximum of 4/5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
'No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/5 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
(Please note: Only documents provided in question 7.9.3 will be scored for this question. All verification or assurance statements attached in one row are subject to the Management level criteria. Please see the CDP verification page for the full list of accepted verification standards. If multiple standards are selected in column ‘Relevant standard', the statements attached should collectively reference all standards selected.)

ROUTE A)
Either 'Complete' OR 'Underway but not complete for reporting year - previous statement of process attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year'.
i) All of the following columns completed - 3.5 points
- 'Scope 3 category'
- 'Verification or assurance cycle in place'
- 'Type of verification or assurance'
- 'Attach the statement'
ii) Column 'Page/section reference' completed - 0.5 points
iii) Column 'Relevant standard' completed - 1 point
iv) Column 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' completed - 1 point
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' - 6 points
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria: Not scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 채점하지 않습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points in question 7.9.3 AND criteria ii) in either Route A or Route B at Management level in question 7.8 must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
ROUTE A)
Document(s) in column 'Attach the statement' meet all of the following criteria - 4 points
i) The statement relates to Scope 3 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions OR it is clear that Scope 3 GHG emissions were the subject of the assurance engagement.
AND
ii) The statement relates to the correct reporting year provided in question 1.4 and 'Complete' is selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year'.
OR
'Annual process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 12-month period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Biennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 2-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Triennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 3-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
AND
iii) The verification standard referenced in the document is accepted by CDP.
AND
iv) The statement contains an opinion or finding which confirms verification.
If all of the above criteria are met an additional point will be awarded for the following:
v) Document in column 'Attach the statement' relates to any of the following Scope 3 categories reported in question 7.8 - 1 point
- 'Purchased goods and services'
- 'Capital goods'
- 'Upstream transportation and distribution'
- 'Downstream transportation and distribution'
- 'Processing of sold products'
- 'Use of sold products'
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' - 4 points
A maximum of 4/5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/5 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
(Please note: Only documents provided in question 7.9.3 will be scored for this question. All verification or assurance statements attached in one row are subject to the Management level criteria. Please see the CDP verification page for the full list of accepted verification standards. If multiple standards are selected in column ‘Relevant standard', the statements attached should collectively reference all standards selected.)

ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' in all rows - 0 points
A maximum of 0/0.5 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/0.5 points is available for this route.
One row scored.

AND

AND

change.scoring_change_summary:
CC All sectors excluding Financial Services Management • Pre-requisite added to require full Disclosure points. • Additional check on column 'Relevant standard' for organizations who report multiple standards in one row. Scoring updated to account for updated functionality in column ‘Relevant standards'. Clarification that if multiple statements are attached then they will all be checked. As well as clarification to what scoring applied to • ROUTE C for organizations who have selected ‘No verification'. organizations who select ‘No verification'.
CC Financial services Management • Pre-requisite added to require full Disclosure points. • Additional check on column 'Relevant standard' for organizations who report multiple standards in one row. • ROUTE C for organizations who have selected ‘No verification'. • Route added for organizations whose activities are ‘Life and/ or Health' only. Scoring updated to account for updated functionality in column ‘Relevant standards'. Clarification that if multiple statements are attached then they will all be checked. As well as clarification to what scoring applied to organizations who select ‘No verification'. Scoring updated to add a route for life/health insurance organizations so that they are assessed by criteria that are most applicable to them.
CC All sectors Leadership • Restructuring of criteria and ROUTE C added for organizations who select ‘No verification'. • Criteria updated to check new column ‘Proportion of total reported scope 3 emissions verified (%)'. Clarification to which scoring criteria applies to organizations who select ‘No verification'. Scoring updated to account for new column ‘Proportion of total reported scope 3 emissions verified (%)'.
